title: CaptureDeviceProvenance
description: Long-lived provenance for which approved capture installation produced a package. Authoritative identity uses stable machine-readable IDs (device_profile_id, hardware_model_identifier, lens_profile_id, enrollment/installation IDs). Never use technician-renamed phone names as identity. Do not include raw serial numbers or unrelated personal device identifiers unless explicitly required and reviewed.

device_profile_id.description: Stable Elektron approved-device profile ID, e.g. CAP-DEVICE-IP17PRO-001

hardware_model_identifier.description: Stable platform/model identifier (not a user-editable device name)

device_display_name.description: Human-readable approved label for UI/reports only — not authoritative identity

lens_profile_id.description: Stable lens profile ID, e.g. LENS-WIDE-001

lens_display_name.description: Optional display label for the lens; not authoritative

capture_installation_id.description: Elektron installation ID for this enrolled capture app instance

device_enrollment_id.description: Elektron enrollment record ID — preferred over raw serials
